description: Tool exposure config. TWO independent mechanisms: (1) per-agent SUBSETS — METIS_TOOL_SUBSETS=1 + METIS_AGENT_SUBSET=<slug> loads only that agent's groups (token-optimized launchers). (2) TOOL SEARCH — METIS_TOOL_SEARCH=1 keeps only the 'core' modules loaded and parks the rest, retrievable on demand via find_tools()/load_tool_group(). Tool search is the recommended setting for the general Desktop/Code session: it cuts the loaded toolset ~60% WITHOUT making anything unreachable (the fix for the '_default must be all' problem below). Set both flags off for developer mode (all tools loaded).
_comment_core: Modules always exposed when METIS_TOOL_SEARCH=1 — the everyday set covering routing, capture, memory, projects/tasks, literature search, news/briefs, files, reflexion and contextual-discovery. Everything else (dhis2, data_tools, anonymization, backup, course_builder, knowledge_db/graph, vector_memory, thinking_profile, zotero, paperqa, transcription, voice, images, code_repository, research_timeline, project_tracker, memory_curator, brainstorm, doctor, pipeline, observability, improvement, config_tools, reviews, observation, ref_miner, fulltext_index, literature_monitor, guardrails) is parked and loaded on demand. Tune freely — membership is module-granular.
_comment_default: _default is the subset loaded when no METIS_AGENT_SUBSET is set — i.e. the general interactive session used by Claude Desktop AND the Claude Code main 'metis-rc' connection. Both have ONE connection and ONE subset for the whole session (no per-agent relaunch), so the default MUST expose every tool — otherwise capabilities like the routed knowledge layer (search_pdf_knowledge), DHIS2, data tools, transcription and voice are unreachable. Hence 'all'. The per-agent subsets above still apply ONLY when METIS_AGENT_SUBSET=<slug> is set explicitly (e.g. token-optimized automation launchers). Set METIS_TOOL_SUBSETS=0 to disable the mechanism entirely.
